_meta.scope: Oliva sample + Holts-shared 'X Double' size splits
notes: Serie V and Serie V Melanio are distinct commercial lines (Habano vs Ecuador Sumatra) — do NOT merge despite prefix overlap.
Monticello Double is not a separate Oliva line: Holt's lists Double Toro 6x60 as a Monticello size on the Monticello category page.
Flor de * and Gilberto Reserva Blanc are genuine distinct lines (false-positive prefix suspects).
Additional merges: exact 'Line' / 'Line Double' pairs that share the same Holts listing URL and whose Double entry is a single oversized vitola (Monticello pattern).

cig-oliva-monticello.reason: Holt's Oliva Monticello page lists Double Toro (6x60) as a size of Monticello, not a separate line. Shared listing URL was the only signal for the false split.

cig-alec-bradley-sanctum.reason: Shared Holts Sanctum listing; Double is a longer 60-ring Gordo (60x216), not a separate line.

cig-padilla-serie-1968.reason: Shared Holts Serie 1968 listing; Double is 60x152 Toro size of the same line.

cig-puros-indios-viejo.reason: Shared Holts Viejo listing; Double is 60x152 Toro size of the same line.

cig-quorum-maduro.reason: Shared Holts Quorum Maduro listing; Double is a single Gordo (60x152) size of the same line.

cig-sam-leccia-white.reason: Shared Holts Sam Leccia White listing; Double is 60x152 Toro size of the same line.

cig-torano-torano-exodus-gold-20th-anniv.reason: Shared Holts Exodus Gold 20th listing; Double is 60x152 Toro size of the same line.

_keep_distinct.reason: Distinct commercial lines: Serie V (sun-grown Habano) vs Serie V Melanio (Ecuador Sumatra, Gran Reserva). Prefix overlap only.
Flor de Connecticut / Corojo / Gold / Maduro / Original are separate wrapper/series lines under the Flor de umbrella.
Gilberto Reserva Blanc is a distinct Connecticut/blanc sibling, not a naming twin of Gilberto Reserva.

_relocate_vitolas.reason: Melanio SKUs (and a Figurado whose product URL is melanio-figurado) were incorrectly attached to the Serie V line entry.
